articles.title: Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
articles.description: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.

articles.title: Crypto brokerage firm Alpaca raises $135 million for tokenized stock infrastructure
articles.description: The company at one pointed cleared or custodied roughly 94% of tokenized U.S. equities, now holding over $1.5 billion in underlying stocks for its partners.

articles.title: 歷時 13 個月航行十億公里，天問二號準備揭開振盪天星神祕面紗

articles.title: Alpaca raises $135M to fund tokenized agent-first infrastructure
articles.description: The BNP-backed brokerage infrastructure provider is expanding into tokenized markets and AI-native financial services as both DeFi and TradFi companies pursue onchain business.

articles.title: Gambling on random Pokémon cards: Onchain gagcha hits record high as crypto sinks
articles.description: Users spent a record $324 million on onchain gacha in June, even as Bitcoin hit a 21-month low. The thrill of scoring a top Pokemon card from a random pack is becoming big business

articles.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
articles.description: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

articles.title: Prediction markets defy crypto downturn with record Q2 volume: CoinGecko
articles.description: Prediction markets reached a record $113.8 billion in notional volume in Q2 as spot CEX trading, derivatives volume and stablecoin market cap declined.

articles.title: Ledger wants AI agents to manage crypto without holding your keys
articles.description: AI agents can read wallet balances and analyze portfolios but requires every sensitive action to be approved on a Ledger hardware device before it can be executed.

articles.title: MoonPay buys Glide to bolster crypto deposits infrastructure
articles.description: MoonPay acquired Glide, a crypto infrastructure startup founded by former Robinhood Wallet engineers, to expand cross-chain crypto deposit infrastructure.

articles.title: Tokenized stocks market cap gains to record $2.3B
articles.description: The market capitalization of tokenized stocks rose to a record $2.3 billion, as investors sought exposure to the growing list of tokenized equity products launched by cryptocurrency exchanges.

articles.title: FATF urges faster crypto AML enforcement as stablecoin crime increases
articles.description: The global task force said criminal networks are using stablecoins and developing proprietary tokens to evade asset freezes as countries struggle to enforce crypto AML rules.

articles.title: Galaxy targets institutional stablecoin yield with new DeFi vaults
articles.description: The crypto financial services firm launched Galaxy Curator, a Morpho-based platform that gives Fireblocks' 2,400 institutional clients access to onchain yield strategies.

articles.title: ARK pushes back against a16z’s ‘TradFi wants blockchain, not DeFi’ claim
articles.description: ARK Invest’s director of research disputed a16z crypto’s thesis that traditional finance will adopt permissioned blockchain infrastructure instead of decentralized finance, saying institutions will increasingly rely on DeFi rails.

articles.title: Ultrahuman’s former hardware VP raises $5.5M for devices that control AI agents, not just record you
articles.description: Aina is going to pilot a new device in the coming weeks.

articles.title: The most popular bitcoin call option has slipped by $10,000
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 18, 2026

articles.title: Inside the high-stakes race to build an open financial system specifically for AI bots
articles.description: The newly-convened x402 Foundation is a neutral space where competitors and payment methods can work together to create an open standard for AI agentic commerce.

articles.title: Thinking Machines 首款開放權重模型發表，制衡中國模型擴張

articles.title: Meta now alerts parents if their teen discussed suicide or self-harm with its AI chatbot
articles.description: The updates come as Meta and other tech companies are facing scrutiny from regulators and parents around how AI chatbots respond to users in crisis, particularly teenagers.

articles.title: AI 需求強勁驅動台積電成長逾 40%，法說會重點一次看
articles.description: AI 需求強勁，晶圓代工廠台積電第二季營運繳出亮麗成績單，單季賺進超過 2.7 個股本，第三季展望依然樂觀，預 […]

articles.title: Bitcoin pulls back to $64,000 after hitting monthly high as bears take control
articles.description: Profit-taking after bitcoin hit a $65,500 monthly high combined with fresh Iranian strikes on U.S. bases sent crypto lower, with bears leading price action across most tokens.
